task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Lead Router** (Level 7)

Build a lead routing API. Prospects submit leads (name, email, company, size). The server applies routing rules: SMB → alice, Mid-market → bob, Enterprise → charlie — set assigned_to automatically before saving. Need: POST /api/leads (submit + auto-route), GET /api/leads (list), GET /api/leads/new (only status='new').

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  s
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Leads table:
  name, required
  email, required
  company
  size, default 'SMB'
  assigned_to
  status, default 'new'


define function get_assigned_person(size):
  if size is 'Enterprise':
    send back 'charlie'
  if size is 'Mid-market':
    send back 'bob'
  send back 'alice'

when user calls POST /api/leads sending data:
  validate data:
    name is text, required
    email is text, required
  assigned_person = get_assigned_person(data's size)
  set data's assigned_to to assigned_person
  saved = save data to Leads
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/leads:
  send back all Leads

when user calls GET /api/leads/new:
  send back all Leads where status is 'new'

page 'App' at '/':
  heading 'Lead Router'
  
  section 'Submit Lead':
    name_val = ''
    email_val = ''
    size_val = 'SMB'
    
    'Name' as text input saved as name_val
    'Email' as text input saved as email_val
    'Company Size' as dropdown with ['SMB', 'Mid-market', 'Enterprise'] saved as size_val
    
    button 'Submit Lead':
      send {name: name_val, email: email_val, size: size_val} as a new record to '/api/leads'
      set name_val to ''
      set email_val to ''
      set size_val to 'SMB'
  
  section 'All Leads':
    on page load get leads from '/api/leads'
    display leads as table
  
  section 'New Leads':
    on page load get new_leads from '/api/leads/new'
    display new_leads as table
